# CodeGetIt

> CodeGetIt is a web development agency based in Thessaloniki, Greece, building static websites, web applications, and full-stack solutions for businesses that need clarity, speed, and momentum.

## Services

- Static Websites: fast, elegant marketing sites with responsive design, SEO optimization, and easy maintenance.
- Web Applications: managed, third-party-service-backed applications for businesses that need interactivity without a custom backend.
- Full-Stack Solutions: custom-built backend, database, and admin tooling for businesses that need full control over their application logic and data.

## Process

CodeGetIt follows a structured process from discovery through delivery, with milestone-based plans available for larger projects and ongoing support after launch (bug fixes, security updates, deployment help, and performance checks).

## Contact

- Website: https://codegetit.com
- Email: info@codegetit.com
- Location: Thessaloniki, Greece
